news.title: India Scraps Taxes to Attract Foreign Investment in Bonds
news.description: India scrapped taxes and removed caps on the ownership of some bonds for foreign investors to attract overseas capital and stabilize the rupee, which has been under pressure from higher energy prices and equity market outflows.
